meaning: n.(尤指对女性)卑鄙的男人,下流人,无赖;Computer Aided Design,计算机辅助设计
examples: We want to make CAD mainstream.
He led this testing study called Converse CAD.
Suppose you are programming a drawing or CAD program.
The 3-D CAD's flexibility let PowerSki engineers almost eliminate the need for pricey prototypes.
Every year another 5% of the 1.2 million 2-D CAD users in manufacturing migrate to 3-D.
